runtimeProfile.basis: P0-P4 clauses exercised here plus the repository T-001..T-047 matrix; resource-specific qualification remains external.

adapterProtocol.basis: Manifest, identity, command sequencing, response loss, retry/reject, output, input and restart scenarios.

resourceSpecificSafety.basis: Reference Mock Adapters have no real external resource safety qualification.

tests.name: P0 protocol/catalog and synchronous Tool
P0 persisted task_required lifecycle and terminal read
P1 checkAvailability four states, risk and windows
P2 scheduled start is durable and never early
P2 retryable start rejection has a bounded retry identity
P3 restricted arbitration accepts or rejects without ambiguity
P3 pause/resume acknowledgements preserve a working execution
P4 input_required and multi-round update
P4 cancel Ack, safe stop proof and duplicate idempotency
P4 invocation idempotency duplicate and conflict
P4 frozen reservation reference is bound to Start identity
P4 frozen MRTR request and keyed response
P4 frozen type-only Evidence projection
P4 response-loss Reconcile without duplicate identity
P4 Adapter task/argument identity conflict
P4 Adapter output mismatch becomes a failed Task
P4 command sequence mismatch is observable
P4 safe-stop permanent, retryable and transport rejection
P4 Adapter process restart retains execution binding
P4 terminal irreversibility and observation/outbox idempotency
